channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzanian Digital Platform MedPack Strengthens Pharmacy Services Across the Country
item.description: In Tanzania, many people start their healthcare journey at local pharmacies and Accredited Drug Dispensing Outlets (ADDOs), but these places often struggle with sourcing medicines, fragmented supply c...

item.title: Third Pakistani killed in UAE due to falling debris from missile interception amid Iran conflict
item.description: Another Pakistani national has tragically lost his life in the United Arab Emirates due to falling debris caused by the interception of a ballistic missile, according to the Abu Dhabi Media Office. Th...

item.title: Ongoing Middle East Conflict Escalates with Strikes on US and Regional Oil Facilities
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East continues to escalate, affecting multiple countries and critical infrastructure. In Baghdad, drones targeted the US Embassy and the Al-Rasheed Hotel, prompting air defe...

item.title: Philippines Refutes China’s Claim Over Scarborough Shoal
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) of the Philippines has officially rejected evidence presented by China to support its claim over Scarborough Shoal. DFA Maritime Affairs spokesperson Rogelio Vi...

item.title: Lobby Group Proposes National Economic Council to Replace Treasury
item.description: A civic reform group in Kenya, Kuna Dawa, has tabled a proposal to scrap the National Treasury and create a new National Economic Council (NEC) through a constitutional amendment. The idea is based on...

item.title: Former Special Task Force Officer Appears in Court Over Marius van der Merwe Killing
item.description: Matipandile Sotheni, a former member of the South African Police Service Special Task Force, appeared briefly in the Brakpan Magistrate’s Court on Monday, facing charges related to the murder of Mariu...

item.title: Protesters across Canada challenge Alberta’s new health law allowing private practice
item.description: Protesters gathered in cities across Canada, including Calgary and Edmonton, as part of a 'Day of Action for Public Healthcare' to oppose Alberta’s recent health legislation, Bill 11. The bill—officia...

item.title: Shortlists for 2026 Women AutHer Awards Revealed Across Four Literary Categories
item.description: The Women AutHer Awards has unveiled the 2026 shortlists across four categories: fiction, nonfiction, debut, and children’s books. Each category features three books competing for the prestigious awar...

item.title: Ijaw National Congress Commends Delta Governor for Development Projects
item.description: The Ijaw National Congress (INC), wey be apex socio-cultural body for Ijaw people, don openly appreciate Delta State Governor, Rt. Hon. Sheriff Oborevwori, for him work on infrastructure and general d...

item.title: Matt Kuhnemann takes key wicket against Hayden Kerr
item.description: In a notable moment of the cricket match, Matt Kuhnemann secured a crucial wicket by dismissing Hayden Kerr with a surprising delivery that left the batter stranded. The incident occurred during a hig...

item.title: Nigerian Stock Market Crosses 200,000 Points, Investors See N29 Trillion Gains
item.description: Naija stock market don reach another important milestone as the All Share Index (ASI) cross 200,000 points yesterday. For the year so far, investors don earn around N29.29 trillion in net capital gain...

item.title: AI Translation Tool Sparks Debate in Video Game Preservation Community
item.description: A recently launched AI-powered translation project called 'Gaming Alexandria Researcher' has sparked controversy in the video game preservation community. Developed using a method called 'vibe coding,...

item.title: Chancellor outlines UK strategy to retain technology firms and boost AI and quantum computing
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has expressed her determination to prevent leading British technology companies and scientists from relocating overseas. Speaking at the National Quantum Computing Centre in O...

item.title: Iran’s Strategic Resilience in the Current Conflict
item.description: The article analyzes the ongoing asymmetric conflict involving Iran, highlighting that despite Iran suffering significant civilian and infrastructure losses, it demonstrates a higher capacity for endu...

item.title: Israel Shuts Down Leviathan and Karish Gas Fields Amid Regional Security Threats
item.description: Since the onset of the ongoing conflict involving Iran, Israel has suspended operations at its major offshore natural gas fields, Leviathan and Karish, located in the eastern Mediterranean. These prec...

item.title: Top Scorers of Tanzania Premier League Compete for Golden Boot
item.description: The 2025/2026 Tanzania Premier League season is giving fans plenty excitement, especially with the race for the Golden Boot. DR Congo striker Fabrice Ngoye from Namungo FC is leading the chart with ei...

item.title: Sindh Building Control Authority clarifies status of Gul Plaza after Jan 17 fire
item.description: The Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) has confirmed that Gul Plaza was built in violation of its approved building plan but shifted responsibility away from the authority, noting that the revise...

item.title: 10 Everyday Foods That Help Improve Sleep Naturally
item.description: If you dey struggle to catch better sleep at night, e no always mean say na stress or phone dey worry you. Sometimes na wetin you chop during the day dey affect your sleep. Your body need nutrients li...

item.title: Zambales congresswoman apologizes and withdraws proposal to rename President Ramon Magsaysay State University
item.description: Zambales Second District Representative Doris “Bing” Maniquiz announced that she will withdraw House Bill 8520, which sought to rename the President Ramon Magsaysay State University (PRMSU) to Zambale...

item.title: President Ruto Launches Western Kenya Development Tour with Kakamega Airstrip Upgrade
item.description: President William Ruto has kicked off a five-day tour across Western Kenya focusing on development and infrastructure improvements. His visit started in Kakamega County where he personally inspected o...
